title: OnboardingProfile
description: One-time user profile. Only the minimum needed to generate a good first program is required; the rest is collected progressively over the first weeks (see docs/data-and-learning-spec.md).

specialization.description: All-in specialization block: priority muscles push to the recoverable ceiling while everything else drops to a maintenance dose. Only meaningful when priority_muscles is non-empty.

items.description: muscle id to bias volume toward

Only equipment the exercise library actually covers. band + kettlebell were added once they had real primary-exercise pools (band covers 15/16 muscles, kettlebell 14/16). smith-machine is still omitted from onboarding (only 9/16 muscles) — its exercises are reachable via the plan editor.

region.description: Must match a key in data/injury-contraindications.json so the exclusion rule actually resolves.

rir_calibrated.description: Whether the user has demonstrated reliable RIR estimation (gates trust in self-reported effort).
